description_long: This is a rectangular, one-liter beverage carton with a predominantly white and blue color scheme, featuring a realistic splash of water and ripe peach imagery on the front. The packaging is labeled 'Paradise Peach' and displays branding from 'EVERYDAY A BETTER DAY' at the top. The carton is made of laminated paperboard with a glossy finish and has a white plastic screw cap located at the top corner. Nutritional information, ingredients, and multilingual product details are printed on the sides and back. The overall design is modern and visually appealing, with clear branding and product imagery.
description: A one-liter rectangular beverage carton with a white plastic screw cap, blue and white branding, and peach imagery on the front.
description_view_0: Side view showing the nutrition facts, social media icons, and part of the cap at the top.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the 'Paradise Peach' branding, peach imagery, and the cap at the top center.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a barcode, product details, and the cap visible at the top.
description_view_3: Back view featuring detailed nutritional information and multilingual text.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label features 'EVERYDAY A BETTER DAY' in red and 'Paradise Peach' in large white and blue text, with realistic peach imagery and a green 'Premium Quality' badge. Sides and back have nutritional facts, barcode, and multilingual product information in black text.
attribute_cap_type: White plastic screw cap, cylindrical with a flat top, located at the top corner of the carton.
attribute_transparency: The carton is opaque with no visible transparency; the material is fully printed and does not allow viewing the liquid inside.
attribute_bottle_neck_design: Short, angled neck integrated into the top corner of the carton, with threading for the screw cap and no additional ridges or flares.
